seoTitle: How to Deposit a Check on PayPal (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to use PayPal's Cash a Check feature to deposit paper checks remotely by photographing both sides and confirming your balance load.
intro: Cashing a paper check no longer requires a trip to the bank if you have PayPal's Cash a Check feature available. This guide covers photographing your signed check, choosing a processing speed, and completing the deposit. It's aimed at anyone who wants to load payroll or personal checks straight into their PayPal balance.

steps.heading: Open Cash a Check in the app
steps.body: Tap your Balance card in the mobile app, then find and select Cash a Check from the sub-menu.

steps.heading: Enter the check amount
steps.body: Type in the exact numerical dollar value shown on the face of your check.

steps.heading: Sign the back of your check
steps.body: Flip the check over and sign your legal name on the endorsement line.

steps.heading: Photograph both sides
steps.body: Place the check on a dark, flat surface with steady lighting, then capture clear photos of the front and back.

steps.heading: Choose a processing speed and finish
steps.body: Pick a free standard hold or a paid instant transfer, confirm, then write VOID across the check once approved and photograph it a final time.

faq.question: How long does a standard check deposit take?
faq.answer: Free standard processing can take up to around 10 days, while paid express options clear much faster.

faq.question: Does instant check cashing cost extra?
faq.answer: Yes, expedited processing is subject to a percentage-based fee compared to the free standard hold.

faq.question: Why do I need to write VOID on the check afterward?
faq.answer: Voiding the check after approval prevents it from being deposited or cashed again elsewhere.

faq.question: What if my photo of the check gets rejected?
faq.answer: Make sure both sides are well-lit, flat, and fully visible in frame to avoid processing errors.
